# GlobalCodio

> AI for Global Immigration: Cut Costs, Grow Revenue.

GlobalCodio is the AI-powered platform and global ecosystem built exclusively for immigration teams — law firms and corporate immigration departments. We deploy AI case management, manage technology operations end-to-end, and connect teams to a global immigration partner network.

## Product

- AI Case Management: intake, document extraction, form preparation, deadlines, renewals, client communication
- Managed Technology Operations: implementation, configuration, integrations, optimization, dedicated support
- Global Immigration Ecosystem: translators, document authentication, foreign attorneys, medical exams, couriers

## Audiences

- Immigration law firms (solo, mid-size, enterprise)
- Corporate immigration departments and mobility teams

## Pricing

Base retainer plus value share tied to cost savings and revenue growth. Typical year-one ROI: 3x.

- Website: https://www.globalcodio.ai/

## Keywords
